name: Patient Case
history: Childhood experiences of emotional invalidation (e.g., being reprimanded for crying). History of depression.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: If I express my emotions, I will be reprimanded or rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not worthy of being included or cared for.
coping_strategies: Avoids expressing emotions and withdraws from social situations.
situation: Not invited to a dinner with friends by one acquaintance.
auto_thought: They don't want me there; I'm not important to them.
behavior: Withdraws and avoids reaching out to friends.
